pipelineName: Enterprise Face AI Enrollment & Verification Pipeline

frontend.duties: Capture video frames, control auto-capture state, encode frames as base64, submit authentication and enrollment requests.

nginx.duties: Expose TLS gateway, proxy API requests to backend-api, proxy direct ML requests to face-ai-service, enforce body limits and keepalives.

backendApi.duties: Enforce RBAC middleware, validate inputs, verify passwords for combined authentication, query PostgreSQL for active embeddings, forward requests to Flask service.

faceAiService.duties: Receive base64 frames, run MTCNN face detection, analyze physical liveness/spoofing, compute 512-dimensional face embeddings, compare vectors using cosine similarity.

database.duties: Store employee configuration, persist active/inactive face embeddings, record audit logs and access attempt logs.
